---
name: Provider request
about: Request support for a new image-generation provider
labels: enhancement, provider
---

**Provider**
Name and link to its API docs.

**Why**
What does it offer that the existing six providers don't (cost, quality, models, free tier)?

**API shape** (if you know it)
- Endpoint + auth style:
- Returns base64 / URL / raw bytes:
- Supports editing (image input)?

PRs welcome — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#adding-a-provider); most providers are ~20 lines.
